assignments.title: Fix fail-open security gates when ripgrep is missing or errors
assignments.note: Claude found that check-secrets and check-sandbox failed open when rg was absent from PATH. Codex review found the same fail-open family still applied when rg existed but exited with a scanner error. This branch now probes for rg and treats rg status 0 as finding detected, status 1 as no match, and any other status as a hard gate failure. Customer-service workspace fixes are intentionally out of scope for this tracked PR and remain local-only until promoted separately.

assignments.title: Customer-service eval: JSONL scenario fixtures + batch eval runner
assignments.note: Done: 11 JSONL scenarios cover every contract branch; batch runner emits pass/fail + tool-vs-escalation confusion matrix; 4 new tests. Full suite 20/20 pass (16 Codex + 4 mine). New files only, did NOT touch Codex's contract harness. Eval outputs (.gitignore'd) do not pollute git. Awaiting Codex review pass.
